---
title: "Oppurtunity"
description-meta: "Research of Sivalingam S M"
title-block-banner: True
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
---

# Prospective Students

Students interested in undergraduate projects, master's dissertations, internships, or future Ph.D. opportunities are encouraged to contact me by email with

- Curriculum Vitae
- Academic Transcript
- Research Interests
- Programming Experience (if any)

I am always happy to discuss research ideas with motivated students.

---

# Areas Available for Student Projects

I welcome motivated students interested in research projects in

- Scientific Machine Learning
- Physics-Informed Neural Networks
- Neural Differential Equations
- Fractional Calculus
- Dynamical Systems
- Control Theory
- Numerical Analysis
- Scientific Computing
- Applied Mathematics

---

# Research Supervision

---

## M.Sc. Students (while at NIT Puducherry)

| Students | Year | Institution |
|:-------|:---------|:---------|
| **Twinkle Sanjay Desai** | 2023-2024 |   - M.Sc. Mathematics - National Institute of Technology Puducherry - Research Area: Fractional Dynamical Systems |
| **Rashmi Ranjan Prusty** | 2024-2025 |   - M.Sc. Mathematics - National Institute of Technology Puducherry - Research Area: Fractional Dynamical Systems |

## Project Interns (while at NIT Puducherry)

| Students | Year | Institution |
|:-------|:---------|:---------|
| **Sriram** | 2023-2024 |   - M.Sc. Mathematics - SRM University - Research Area: Control Theory |
| **Meera Ramesh** | 2023-2024 |   - M.Sc. Mathematics - Christ University - Research Area: Control Theory |
| **Rahma** | 2024-2025 |   - M.Sc. Mathematics - Central University of Tamil Nadu - Research Area: Mathematical Modelling |


<!-- # Programming and Software

Students working with me typically gain experience in

- Python
- MATLAB
- Mathematica
- R Programming
- LaTeX
- Scientific Computing Libraries

--- -->
